name: dev-workflow
description: Git, PRs, tickets, releases, visual diffs, planning, TDD, debugging, and review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Git, PR, planning, TDD, debugging, visual diff, and review workflows
interface.longDescription: Git, PRs, tickets, releases, visual diff reports, planning, TDD, debugging, and review workflows, including conventional commits, PR creation, PR feedback handling, spec interviews, spec contradiction checks, PR approval, slash-command push flows, implementation planning, systematic debugging, development completion workflows, and HTML diff reports.
defaultPrompt: Create a conventional commit for these changes.
Render this git diff as an HTML report.
Interview me to produce an implementation spec.
Use TDD for this bug fix.
Help me plan and execute this feature.
